notes: Close-and-redeem now correct for annual-compounding instruments (FD/RD). The bug: a second projection pass (the annual-interest recompute for FD/RD/PPF/Bonds) overwrote the engine's balances and ignored the close lifecycle event, so the RD never zeroed and savings didn't receive the money. Fix: that annual branch now honors the close event — it zeroes the instrument from the close month onward AND emits the correct redeemed amount into savings (correcting the cash series + redemptionInflow so the savings recompute picks it up). Close-month rule clarified per user: the close month gets NO further contribution — you redeem whatever was accumulated through the PRIOR month. So closing RD in June redeems the May-end balance (e.g. 1,48,000), May stays 1,48,000, June onward 0, and savings increases by 1,48,000 once. The close modal's redeem-amount now pre-fills from the month-before-close balance (and updates if you change the close month) so the Journal entry matches what actually moves. Verified the timeline zeroes the close-month contribution.
